create or replace function setup_vector_store(table_name text) returns void language plpgsql as $$
begin
    -- Drop the function if it exists, ensuring the signature matches the new definition
    execute 'drop function if exists match_strategies(int, jsonb, vector)';
    
    -- Create the table. Added 'embedding vector' column which is required for the vector search logic.
    execute format('create table %I ( 
        id bigint primary key generated always as identity, 
        description text, 
        metadata jsonb, 
        embedding vector
    )', table_name);
    
    -- Create the match_strategies function.
    -- Added 'query_embedding vector' parameter to the function arguments.
    -- Fixed the dynamic SQL syntax, specifically the ORDER BY clause and table references.
    execute format('
        create function match_strategies ( 
            match_count int default null, 
            filter jsonb default "{}"::jsonb, 
            query_embedding vector 
        ) 
        returns table ( id bigint, description text, metadata jsonb, similarity float ) 
        language plpgsql 
        as $$
        begin
            return query 
            select 
                id, 
                description, 
                metadata, 
                1 - (embedding <=> query_embedding) as similarity
            from %I 
            where metadata @> filter 
            order by embedding <=> query_embedding 
            limit match_count;
        end;
        $$;', table_name);
end;
$$

WITH RECURSIVE CumulativeEmissions AS (
    -- Anchor Member: Select leaf nodes (items with no children)
    -- For leaves, cumulative emission is just their own emission
    SELECT 
        t.entityid, 
        t.parentid, 
        t.emission, 
        t.emission AS cumulative_emission
    FROM tree_table t
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM tree_table child 
        WHERE child.parentid = t.entityid
    )
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive Member: Select parents of the nodes calculated in the previous step
    -- Calculate cumulative emission as: own emission + sum(child's cumulative * contribution %)
    SELECT 
        parent.entityid, 
        parent.parentid, 
        parent.emission, 
        parent.emission + SUM(child_cum.cumulative_emission * (parent.pctcontribution / 100.0))
    FROM tree_table parent
    JOIN CumulativeEmissions child_cum ON parent.entityid = child_cum.parentid
    GROUP BY parent.entityid, parent.parentid, parent.emission
)
SELECT 
    entityid, 
    parentid, 
    cumulative_emission
FROM CumulativeEmissions
ORDER BY entityid NULLS FIRST

WITH student_grades AS (

        -- Extract the student ID (e.g., 'student1' from 'student1_lowgrade')
        split_part("element", '_', 1) AS student_id,
        -- Extract the grade type (e.g., 'lowgrade' from 'student1_lowgrade')
        substring("element", position('_' in "element") + 1) AS grade_type,
        "record"
    FROM "frpm_record"
),
calculated_rates AS (
    SELECT
        student_id || '_rate' AS element,
        -- Calculate the rate: low grade value / high grade value
        MAX(CASE WHEN grade_type = 'lowgrade' THEN "record" END) / 
        MAX(CASE WHEN grade_type = 'highgrade' THEN "record" END) AS "record"
    FROM student_grades
    GROUP BY student_id
)
-- Combine original records with the new calculated rates
SELECT "element", "record"
FROM "frpm_record"
UNION ALL
SELECT element, "record"
FROM calculated_rates

WITH "credits" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        12 AS "ARTCRED",
        7.5 AS "BIZCRED",
        12 AS "HUMCRED",
        14 AS "NATCRED",
        11 AS "TEKCRED",
        9 AS "GENCRED",

    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        15 AS "ARTCRED",
        9 AS "BIZCRED",
        14 AS "HUMCRED",
        16 AS "NATCRED",
        13 AS "TEKCRED",
        11 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2020', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        10.5 AS "ARTCRED",
        6 AS "BIZCRED",
        5 AS "HUMCRED",
        4 AS "NATCRED",
        6 AS "TEKCRED",
        3 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
),

"grp_choices" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('03.03.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'BIZ' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('05.05.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'NAT' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2022', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
),

"ranked_credits" AS (
    SELECT
        C.*,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY C."ID" ORDER BY C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" DESC) AS RN
    FROM "credits" C
    -- Join to choices to filter relevant credit rows and rank them per choice context
    -- This ensures we pick the credit valid at the time of the choice
    JOIN "grp_choices" G ON C."ID" = G."ID" AND C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" <= G."DATECHOICE"
)

SELECT
    G."ID",
    G."GROUPCHOICE",
    CASE
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'ART' THEN RC."ARTCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'BIZ' THEN RC."BIZCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'HUM' THEN RC."HUMCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'NAT' THEN RC."NATCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'TEK' THEN RC."TEKCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'GEN' THEN RC."GENCRED"
    END AS "CREDIT_VALUE"
FROM "grp_choices" G
JOIN "ranked_credits" RC ON G."ID" = RC."ID" AND RC."RN" = 1
ORDER BY G."ID", G."DATECHOICE"

SELECT m."molecule_id", TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS act_date
